HowItWorks.badge: From idea to product in minutes, not weeks
HowItWorks.heading: How
HowItWorks.subtext: We replaced the traditional design-to-print pipeline with AI. The result? 100x faster, 10x cheaper, infinitely more creative.

s1.title: Describe Your Vision
s1.description: Type any design idea in plain English. Our AI understands complex descriptions, styles, moods, and aesthetics. You can be as specific or as abstract as you want.

s2.title: AI Generates Designs
s2.description: Our proprietary AI model generates 4 unique design variants in under 10 seconds. Each design is original, high-resolution, and print-ready. Pick your favorite or generate more.

s3.title: Premium Print Production
s3.description: We use industry-leading DTG (Direct-to-Garment) and sublimation printing. Every product is made with premium materials and goes through quality control before shipping.

s4.title: Fast Global Shipping
s4.description: Your custom product ships within 2-5 business days. Track your order in real-time. We ship to 180+ countries with express and standard options.

q1.q: How does the AI design generator work?
q1.a: Simply type a text prompt describing your design idea, choose a style and product type, and our AI generates four unique designs in seconds. You can then customize, order, or add them to your store.

q2.q: What is the print quality like?
q2.a: We use premium DTG (Direct-to-Garment) printing and high-quality sublimation for all products. Colors are vibrant, durable, and wash-resistant. Every order goes through quality control before shipping.

q3.a: Standard shipping takes 5-8 business days within the US. Express shipping (2-3 days) is available. International orders typically arrive within 10-15 business days.

q4.q: Can I sell designs I create on TrendThread AI?
q4.a: Absolutely! Join our Creator Program and earn 10-20% commission on every sale. You own the commercial rights to any design you generate on our platform.

q5.q: Is there a limit to how many designs I can create?
q5.a: Free accounts can generate up to 10 designs per day. Pro Creator accounts get unlimited generations, and Business accounts include bulk generation tools.

q6.a: Yes! Our Shopify integration lets you push designs directly to your Shopify store with one click. We handle printing, packing, and shipping automatically.

q7.q: What if I am not happy with my order?
q7.a: We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If there is any issue with print quality or product defects, we will reprint or refund your order within 30 days.

q8.q: Can I use TrendThread AI for my existing brand?
q8.a: Yes! Business accounts include white-label options with custom branding, packaging inserts, and your own logo on packing slips.
